move.title: Choose the invoice follow-up
move.lede: Acme is 14 days overdue and has not replied to the first reminder. The next message should either preserve the relationship or apply firmer pressure.
move.context: Acme usually pays within a week. The account is worth $48k annually, and their champion is on parental leave until June. Finance wants the invoice cleared this month.

blocks.content: Recommended path: send a relationship-preserving reminder to the finance alias, CC the interim sponsor, and set a Friday follow-up.

listener: decide whether and how to continue
